reviews.review_title: Scarier monsters and more camera film
reviews.review_description:

Hi mexicanpicklerat567,

reviews.review_description:
I've got few complaints about this bc wtf did I just play.

1) can't make a private lobby to play with just my friends.
2) the character model is not rigged properly. Plus hella clipping.
3) the game itself was bugged. The camera disappeared when me and my husband made it to day 2.
4) How THE F*CK ARE YOU SUPPOSED TO GET THE SPIDERS OFF?!
5) Couldn't run for sh*t, it refused to toggle.
6) why dont we have weapons of any sort to protect ourselves?????

developer_response.body:
Hi ToastySystem69,

It sounds like you had an absolutely chaotic first run!  We totally understand the frustration when the mechanics aren't super obvious right away, so let’s clear up that "wtf did I just play" feeling and address your points one by one:

1- Private Lobbies: You actually can play just with your friends! You can easily send invites to your friends using the screen in the main lobby to start a private session.

2- Character Models & Clipping: We hear you on this one. We are currently working on polishing the rigging and smoothing out those clipping issues for future updates.

3- The Missing Camera: That wasn't a bug! In order to get your camera back for Day 2, you and your team actually have to go to sleep at the end of the day. No sleep, no camera!

4- The Spiders: You can't get them off yourself! This is a hardcore co-op mechanic. Your friend has to physically grab the spider off your head and throw it on the ground to save you. 

5- Running: Your character has a stamina system. If you run too much, you will get exhausted and won't be able to sprint again until you catch your breath.

6- Weapons: Adding weapons would turn this into a completely different genre of game! The entire thrill and purpose of Viral Descent is to survive purely to film the terrifying world around you, not to fight it like an action shooter. 

We know the game throws a lot at you all at once, but we hope this clears things up! We would love for you to give it another shot with these tips in mind. Come join our Discord at liminagames.com/viral-descent if you need more survival advice or want to share your scary clips with us!

reviews.review_title: I thinking of making a movie about this
reviews.review_description: This game is really unique. It’s made me think about how to make a movie about this. This game got me so inspired to the point that now I really do wanna make a movie about this. I would like to see how I go with this movie so yeah, this game is great and I can’t wait to agree with the creators of this.￼

developer_response.body:
Hi ibedev47199,

Wow, that is honestly one of the best compliments we have ever received! We are incredibly honored that Viral Descent inspired you enough to think about a movie.

Thanks for the amazing support and the 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: How do I play with other people.
reviews.review_description: Unclear bro. Edit: it’s actually pretty easy the game is just so dead an unfun no one wants to play it

developer_response.body:
Hi LeonardoDavinci1987,

We totally get why that’s frustrating! Figuring out how to team up shouldn't be a puzzle before the scary stuff even starts.

It is actually pretty simple once you know where to look! To play with other people, just head over to the screen in the main lobby. From there, you can easily send invites to your friends and get a private game going. We are definitely taking your feedback to heart and looking into ways to make this much clearer for new players.

We would love to turn that 1 star around once you get a game going! Would you like to join our Discord at liminagames.com/viral-descent to find a squad to play with and let us know how your first multiplayer run goes?

reviews.review_title: Good game just a few bugs
reviews.review_description:
This game has gotten better, but could still use work. 
1. I played with some more friends but i couldn’t hear one in game
2. The video recording had some audio glitches with the timing
 
This game has gotten better from my last review like way better. Hope this helps.

developer_response.body:
Hi SallyFace0,

Thank you for the 4 stars and for noticing the improvements! We are really happy to hear the game feels "way better" than before.

Regarding the voice chat issue: Please try closing the Oculus chat (system chat) before entering the game. Sometimes the system chat overrides the in-game voice features, which might be why you couldn't hear your friend.

As for the audio timing glitches in recordings, we would like to investigate this further. Could you please join our Discord server at liminagames.com/discord and open a ticket? This helps us pinpoint the cause and fix it.

We hope the voice chat tip helps! If these solutions work for you, we would be grateful if you could consider updating your rating to 5 stars. Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_title: Good game but needs more content updates
reviews.review_description: This is my updated review up the game and I will say it’s gotten better there’s probably glitches here and there with the loading screens but other then that the game is great one thing I do have to say and recommend is new monsters or maps because it’s getting a little boring with the same monsters so please add more content updates instead of just adding new cosmetic because I would rather have new monsters and maps and the game would probably get even more popular then it is if the dev team could just add more stuff to do in the game rather then new cosmetics every month so please listen to feedback and add more updates that is my only issue with the game there’s not much monsters.

developer_response.body:
Hi Yoboykolby,

Thank you so much for the updated review and the 5 stars! We really appreciate you sticking with us.

We hear you loud and clear: Less cosmetics, more content. You are absolutely right—new monsters and maps are essential to keep the game fresh. While cosmetics are faster to create, we know that actual gameplay updates are what you really want.

Please be assured that we are working on expanding the core content. 

Your feedback is super valuable to guide our roadmap.

I love the concept of the game and i really wish i could rate it higher, but every few seconds my visual goes black and i camt see anything then it goes back to normal and just continues, id love to be able to play this game but this bug just ruins the potential experience for me to be honest.

developer_response.body:
Hi suncicle,

Thank you for the feedback. We are glad you love the concept, but we are incredibly sorry that this visual glitch is ruining the experience for you.

The screen going black every few seconds is definitely not normal and sounds very frustrating. We need to investigate this immediately to see if it is a bug or a headset-specific issue.

Could you please join our Discord server at liminagames.com/discord and open a ticket? We want to get this resolved for you quickly so you can actually enjoy the game.

Once we fix this issue, we would be very grateful if you could consider updating your rating. Thanks for your patience!

developer_response.body:
Hi Nexus188,

Thank you for the 4 stars and for recommending the game despite the issue! We are glad to hear you find the gameplay fun.

We are sorry about the bug where the game gets stuck at the "patching together your video" screen. Since this happens specifically during the video processing stage, we need to investigate it closely to prevent it from interrupting your sessions.

Could you please join our Discord server at liminagames.com/discord and open a ticket? Your report will help us polish this feature during Early Access.

We appreciate your patience and understanding. Once we fix this, we would be very grateful if you considered updating your rating to 5 stars!

developer_response.body:
Hi keanu1.547977,

Thank you for your honest feedback. We are sorry to hear about the bugs and the progression feeling too steep.

Regarding the monsters, there are actually 9 different types currently in the game: Chest, Slime Monster, Little Monster, Wendigo, Flame Monster, Bomb, Mirror, Ghost, and Headcrab. Some are rarer or appear in different situations, so you might just haven't met them all yet!

As for the bugs and the difficulty balance, could you please join our Discord server at liminagames.com/discord and open a ticket? Your specific feedback on balancing helps us adjust the difficulty for future updates.

We are working hard to improve the game. If you encounter the other monsters and feel the experience improves, we would be grateful if you could consider updating your rating!

reviews.review_description: i got gifted this by my friend to try this game and it was kinda glitchy at first but we soon got the hang of it and it was really fun. It was buggy trying invite people to the party and a black screen after we start it.

This is one of my all time favorite multiplayer games to play with my friends. There’s a a blind fire-breathing monster, a portal, walking bombs, and so many more terrifying creatures. The flashlights and camera are on batteries which makes the game more exciting and terrifying at the same time. The sound effects are peak and the gadgets (confetti cannon, microphones, etc) are great for getting views quickly. If you’re looking for an adventure-packed and scream-filled game to play with your friends, then this is one of your best choices. 10/10, 5 gold stars, and two thumbs up! Nice work devs🫡
I am a femboy

DO NOT PURCHASE. The solo demo worked, but immediately after purchase the game fails to properly render other players and levels. A friend and I (Both North America players) had over 130mb/s connection even when one of us was the host. Game would either fail to probably render the other player with them rubber-banding across entire level or fail to render any part of the level with complete black screen for both players. 

Note: Both players on separate networks had strong internet connections and MetaQuest 3s

developer_response.body: Hi METAVERSEJACK, we’re really sorry you had that experience. We’d love to help solve the issue so you can actually enjoy the game — that’s important to us. If you can join our Discord and open a ticket, we can talk it through together and work on a fix: liminagames.com/discord. We’d really like to get you to a point where you’re having fun, not frustration.

reviews.review_description: very good game scary but fun but its not letting climb the ladder

developer_response.body:
Hi TheCyberArcher,

Thank you for the 3 stars and for calling the game "very good" and "scary but fun"! We are thrilled that you are enjoying the scares.

We completely understand why the ladder is frustrating you! It might seem like a bug, but it is actually a hardcore survival mechanic. To climb the ladder, you need to use both of your hands. That means you have to make a very stressful choice: you must drop or put away your camera or flashlight before you can climb up to safety! It definitely makes running away a lot scarier. 

Give it a try on your next run! And if you want to find a squad to watch your back while you climb, come join our Discord at liminagames.com/viral-descent.

Good luck out there!

reviews.review_description: A great cheap game which is actually fun to play and fun with friends, BUT the only problem I have is voice chat, it works fine but the audio quality is not the best, as I record my gameplay I hate the sound of the horrible mic quality in game. developer_response.body: Hi xNathan2020x, thank you for the kind words and the 5 stars. Voice chat quality and small bugs are on our radar — feedback like yours helps us prioritize improvements. Glad you're having fun in the meantime!

I love the game so far,but I do think the battery percentage on the camera could go down a bit slower for a longer and funnier video,me and my dad were playing and the video was cut short due to the quickness of the percentage going down,if you can change it to make it to last longer that would be awesome.😁


Another thing that I think could make this game better is adding a working weapon to stun monsters so you can run away, like a taser,and you have to by ammunition for the gun and you could charge 30-40$ per shot,and put it in the gadgets category.

If you can make this happen in some way, this would be the best game that I own😁

developer_response.body: Hi Shreddy81, thank you for the kind words and the 5 stars. We're glad you're enjoying the game with your dad! Your suggestions are really appreciated and helpful as we plan future updates. In the latest update, we added the Stickgun — it lets you slow down monsters by firing. We'd love to hear more gadget ideas like yours!

reviews.review_description: Almost every game we have to close out and come back in and restart my friend said he sees me flying around and running in circles but I’m standing still and at the end of some round you just get a black screen can do anything about it it will never load I got it 4 times in a row couldn’t get past day 2 please fix is also the mirror can send you out of the shuttle so you get locked out forever

developer_response.body:
Hi mollie1735, thank you for the detailed feedback. We understand how frustrating these issues are. The team is taking note of the bugs you mentioned and will address them in future updates to improve stability and gameplay. If you’d like, you can join our Discord to share more detailed feedback — it helps us understand the issues better and work on more effective fixes: liminagames.com/discord
. If these fixes improve your experience, we’d be super grateful if you’d consider updating your rating.

reviews.review_description: It’s a good game just the arms are to short one hand is long and the other it relly short also my friend was lagging

reviews.review_description: Me and my friends were playing this game like normal just got it today actually and we found one common glitch that kept happening. Once we would get decently far my 2 friends would get a glitch where their arms would work and nothing would fix it and the only way to fix was to restart the game after we already made it descently far please fix

developer_response.body: Hi Vector234, thanks for letting us know about the arm glitch. We’re investigating and working on a fix. You’re welcome to join our Discord to share more details and stay updated: https://liminagames.com/discord. If the patch improves your experience, we’d be really grateful if you’d consider updating your rating.
